response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, aligning well with the role's requirements. His work at Shopify and Stripe demonstrates pragmatic API and web architecture skills, while his open-source projects show strong learning ability and interest in clean software. Though his PostgreSQL experience is unclear, his relational database exposure (MongoDB) and AI/LLM integration work at Stripe mitigate this concern.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js from roles at Shopify and Stripe
Strong API and web architecture knowledge, including REST and AI-agent infrastructure
Open-source contributions and teaching experience (workshops, talks) showing collaborative and mentoring skills
concerns: Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience (though MongoDB exposure exists)
No direct mention of energy/construction technology domain experience
High seniority (Staff/Senior roles) may be overqualified for a Junior/Mid-level role
